function.name: repo_overlay_inspect
function.description: Inspect a path under the MiOS repo root. The repo root IS the system root in MiOS — usr/, etc/, home/, srv/, v1/ mirror the deployed image 1:1. There is no separate system_files/ directory.

overlay_path.description: Path relative to repo root, e.g. 'usr/lib/bootc/kargs.d/00-mios.toml' or 'etc/containers/systemd/mios-ai.container'.

compare_with_base.description: If true, also report what the upstream ucore-hci base image ships at the same path (for conflict detection).
